content:
3. Should There Be a “Fate Wheel” That Determines Some Weekly Events?

✔ A spinning wheel (real or digital) could add additional randomness to the weekly chaos events.

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.5. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?

📌 Version 8.6 – Trades, Exiles, Fate Wheel, Tarot, Astrology, Familiars, & Archetype Expansion


🚀 This iteration finalizes item trades, permanent exile rules, the Fate Wheel, weekly Tarot & astrology elements, familiars, and expanded archetype stats.

📜 1. Item Trades – Sacrificing a Turn to Exchange Power

📜 Players can trade items, but it costs them their turn for that class.

✔ Trade Rules:
• A player must voluntarily forfeit their turn to trade an item.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 508 (chunk 508/555)
